struct AppConfig {
    mode: String,
    log_level: String,
    feature_x: bool,
    api_base_url: String,
}

impl AppConfig {
    fn from_env() -> Self {
        Self {
            mode: std::env::var("APP_MODE").unwrap_or_else(|_| "production".into()),
            log_level: std::env::var("LOG_LEVEL").unwrap_or_else(|_| "info".into()),
            feature_x: std::env::var("FEATURE_X").map(|v| v == "true").unwrap_or(false),
            api_base_url: std::env::var("API_BASE_URL")
                .unwrap_or_else(|_| "https://api.example.com".into()),
        }
    }
}

struct Server {
    config: AppConfig,
}

impl Server {
    async fn handle_request(&self, req: Request) -> Response {
        if self.config.mode == "debug" {
            return Response::debug();
        }
        let result = process(&req, &self.config).await;
        Response::ok(result)
    }
}

async fn process(_req: &Request, _config: &AppConfig) -> String { todo!() }

struct Request;
struct Response;
impl Response {
    fn debug() -> Self { Self }
    fn ok(_body: String) -> Self { Self }
}
